messages.content: You triage Driftwood (a SaaS task-tracker) support tickets. Reply with ONLY a JSON object with keys: category (string), priority (low|medium|high|urgent), sentiment (negative|neutral|positive), needs_human (boolean), draft_reply (string). No prose, no code fences. Watch for tickets that are polite on the surface but negative underneath, and for ambiguous categories — escalate (needs_human=true) when unsure.

Subject: How do I create an automation rule?

I saw the announcement about the new Automations feature. Where do I set up a rule like 'when a task moves to Done, notify the channel'? Couldn't find it under project settings.

response.content: {"category":"automation","priority":"low","sentiment":"neutral","needs_human":false,"draft_reply":"Automations live under Project Settings → Automations. Pick the 'task moves to Done' trigger and the 'notify channel' action — your example takes about a minute to set up."}
